name: Loi de Stefan-Boltzmann
description: Calculez la puissance rayonnée par un corps noir.

example_label: Find radiated power from a 2.m² surface at 500 K with emissivity 0.85.
result_context: The radiated power {power} W is emitted according to the Stefan-Boltzmann law.
